message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object must have keys: "question" with value "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure". "feedback" string. "complies" boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text.

Text: "Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

Question 1: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters. So no. Feedback: It doesn't list sections. Complies false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false.

We should produce array with 3 objects. Provide feedback accordingly.

Let's craft feedback: mention lack of chapter listing, no description, no structure.

Make sure boolean values are true/false.

Return JSON array.
